channel.title: Shanghai Weather Forecast
channel.description: Daily weather forecast for Shanghai via QWeather.

item.title: 2026-06-19: Moderate Rain, 24°C - 28°C
item.description:
Condition (Day): Moderate Rain (Icon: 306)
Condition (Night): Moderate Rain (Icon: 306)
Temperature: 24°C to 28°C
Precipitation: 26.6 mm
Cloud Cover: 98%

Wind (Day): SW (225°), Scale 1-3, Speed 3 km/h
Wind (Night): SW (225°), Scale 1-3, Speed 3 km/h

Humidity: 85%
Visibility: 24 km
Sun: Rise 04:51, Set 19:01
Moon: Rise 08:58, Set 22:41 (Phase: Waxing crescent,801)
UV Index: 5
